title: Telegram document summary
goal: Verify that Telegram document attachments are downloaded, inspected, and summarized end to end.
prompt: Please inspect this document and summarize it.
prerequisites: A text-like document or PDF ready to send
steps: Send the document to the bot with the suggested prompt.
Capture screenshots or logs if the bot falls back to a generic failure response.
assertions: Document is summarized rather than only metadata-inspected.
No local path internals are leaked in the reply.
Gateway does not crash on attachment handling.
